8757790982047344627: **Valibot Compatibility**: Full support for Valibot’s validation and transformation mechanisms.
4924912414602181025:
**Exclusive Mode**: Within a single `schema`, only one of the following sub-schemas is permitted: `allOf`, `oneOf`, `anyOf`, or `if/then/else`.

> Note: `not` is exempt from this restriction.
5466273525220233455:
**Priority Rules**: When `const` or `enum` appears, prioritize conversion and ignore other validations.  
> When fields with restricted ranges appear, prioritize their implementation.
7818645840194579620: **Nested Restrictions**: Nested sub-schemas are not supported within `allOf`/`oneOf`/`anyOf`/`if/then/else` sub-schemas.
1849262189535220912: **Reference Limitation**: `$ref` supports only single-file references and does not support remote references.
2496302162431936292:
**Deadlock Detection**: The input data must not contain deadlocks.

> A deadlock occurs when certain fields consistently fail validation.
